name: ADHD Medication Codes
description: Medication names and RxNorm codes for attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) treatments including stimulants (amphetamine, methylphenidate derivatives) and non-stimulants (atomoxetine, guanfacine, clonidine, viloxazine). Used in ADHD medication follow-up and initiation/continuation quality measures (ADD).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Amphetamine — mixed amphetamine salts (Adderall) — CNS stimulant for ADHD
Lisdexamfetamine (Vyvanse) — prodrug CNS stimulant for ADHD
Methylphenidate (Ritalin, Concerta) — CNS stimulant for ADHD
Atomoxetine (Strattera) — selective norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor for ADHD
Guanfacine (Intuniv) — alpha-2 adrenergic agonist for ADHD
Clonidine (Kapvay) — alpha-2 adrenergic agonist for ADHD
Viloxazine (Qelbree) — selective norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor for ADHD
Methylphenidate Hydrochloride 18 MG Extended Release Oral Tablet
Guanfacine 1 MG Extended Release Oral Tablet
